description: A good experience, for me it is very useful and I need it badly, because I have a YouTube channel that is interested in the same field of my work, as it helps me a lot by finding keywords and competitiveness with all the necessary details for me
author: maged Y.
pros: It is important to me as a marketing director for the company. I am a marketing director for the company on the private website and the channel as well. It is easy to use for searching for keywords, and it is also free.
cons: Please add the Arabic language to make it easier to use and encourage more use of the site and the tool

review_title: Best data mining tool for SEO specialists
description: Im very glad, that Marketing Miner has click-stream data, that´s the biggest feature. I recommend it for SEO, PPC specialist and copywriters.
author: Tomáš N.
pros: I mostly like the tools that Marketing Miner have (approx. 40+ tools) for data minig (Keyword, Domain, URL or Product data mining). Quality click-stream data for SEO specialists.
cons: I don´t like the UI and UX in some part of the tool, but they developing and redesigning the tool very quickly.

review_title: It's a fine product to help you build your website and brand.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It can be helpful in determining keywords and making you expand your brand and build a quality website.
cons: It's a little difficult to use at first, but the amount of features is part of the issue. Ultimately, it was hard to justify using.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It is a great program and I plan on paying for the service soon.
author: Steven O.
pros: Easy program with optimal scenarios to build SEO.
cons: The cost of the services is overwhelming.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: One of the must-have SEO tools for everyday work
description: I use it basically every day for approximately 5 years and it has been a ride! It was crucial for my agency work as well as for client-side work. Quick and comprehensive tool for gathering massive amount of valuable data for On-Page SEO. Off-Page SEO is a bit limited with this one though as well as crawling websites. You will always need to have Ahrefs or similar and some kind of crawler to have the full kit. :)
author: Michal Š.
pros: It's functionality for keyword research and content SEO is just amazing!
cons: Kinda weak for Off-Page SEO. You need to know exactly what data are you after.

description: We are using Marketing Miner to track our domain and keyword system.
author: Stella K.
pros: I most like their keyword analysis tool which allows you to get information about your current situation in your customer's mind. And also you can use this and other analysis tools, for example link analysis to get know about your competitors. And it's really good to have competitor's information. If you can use it wisely you can test and benchmark your domain and this will help you to grow in your industry by know what you have to do exactly on the moment.
cons: There are a few things that I don't like about Marketing Miner. First one is about interface and especially dashboard. You can't see everything clearly. It's difficult to use at first glance. Overall platform is little bit clunky that makes it takes time. Their customer care service is not what I expected, not so responsive.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Featured packed, easy to use SEO tool
description: Overall Marketing Miner is a great all-around SEO software that every SEO/marketing team should have in their stack.
author: Tadeáš A.
pros: I the Rank tracking feature the most and use it to track positions. Also, Brand monitoring is super useful it allows you to get an email notification whenever your or your competitors were mentioned in an article which can help you react and find opportunities for backlinks or partnerships.
cons: I think the browser extension could be a bit easier to use, but apart from that, it is a great piece of SEO software.

review_title: The best tool to monitor websites
description: Marketing Miner showed me the shortcomings I have compared to the competition!
author: Vladimír P.
pros: Marketing miner allows me to monitor my sites and especially competitor sites.
cons: I couldn't find anything to dislike about Marketing Miner.

author: Ramin S.
pros: Marketing Miner is the perfect application to track keynotes. It is really great to have such kind of application on the market. If you want to get information from your customers about your company and your domain then you should try it. And also you can compare data of your competitors and this will give you great opportunities to start some specific project on right time.
cons: There are no any significant complaints about Marketing Miner. If they bring mobile application it would be great for right now to quick checking the stuff you need.

author: Pavel N.
pros: It has a great set of features that we use a lot – from SEO reports to building back link profile. With MM we are able to monitor the web for any mentions of our brand on both the web and social media, thanks to which we never miss important conversations about us.
cons: Sometimes it is a little challenging to navigate.

review_title: My personal review of Marketing Miner
description: It is simple and powerful. Provides support for most all necessary tasks in SEO . For very good price.
author: Tomáš M.
pros: Price/Performance ratio. It offers a lot of music for little money.
cons: I can't think of anything. Maybe responsivity can be little bit better for small displays, but this is not huge problem.

author: Pavel U.
pros: Gives me much more time to solve important issues. Lot of great SEO tools which evolves every day. What else you need?
cons: Sometimes UI and easy to use. Rarely reports fails. I'd love also mobile app for Android. resposnive version does not work perfectly.

review_title: very powerful program that has helped me improve the SEO of my projects
description: Thanks to Marketing Miner, I have optimized my SEO and I have also improved the relevant content for the target audience.
author: david G.
pros: This program is all in one, before I had more than 3 programs to achieve my SEO objectives, but with MARKETING MINER I have everything I need.
cons: I have had problems adapting to the interface and I do not like to use it from my mobile device, but in general the program is very good
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I like MM for its simple and clear environment and the opportunity to use the unpaid part. When I need to, I pay for a month and then I can use it again free of charge.
author: Věra V.
pros: simple intuitive settings and reports, great support,
cons: I don't understand some technical reports, but that's not an application error. Maybe explain better what the results of the reports mean

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's always challenging period when a company wants to start a game-changing project or some specific event on organization's lifetime each company has to get know everything in their field to be more familiar it;s current situation on a market and competitor's strengths and weaknesses. And when this happens you have to make your marketing process more clear to get detailed information. Marketing Miner is this kind of application which will give you a great chance to be able to make your link and keyword analysis for your company.
cons: We would like to see mobile application to get a highly reachable access to our analyzing process and make quick changes. Otherwise everything is working quite smooth and without mistake.
author_profession: Digital Learning Coach and IT Integrator
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Huge time savings and hard-to-get data provided. Must have tool for advanced SEO.
author: Zdenek D.
pros: Ability to work with large data for a reasonable price. I opened new options for my analysis and insights.
cons: Some miners cannot run si sub sequencies, but I can live with that. Marketing Miner can be a bit confusing at the first sight, but take your time to fell in love with it.

review_title: Very happy to recommend Marketing Miner
description: Overall, Marketing Miner has served it's purpose and we are satisfied. Can definitely recommend!
author: David C.
pros: We've used marketing miner for Google SERP position tracking and it has delivered on its promise. It's a reliable and relatively inexpensive tool and fits great in our marketing stack.
cons: I'm used to working with Ahrefs mostly so getting used to Marketing Miner took some time.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
